text: ica loigi ijo niganigi ipegitegi GanigotGa
Eyodi dowediteloco naodigijedi micoataGa daGa me lionigipi
nGida niwenigi daGaxa me dakake loojedi .
NiGida niwenigi eliodi me dakake loojedi
NaGajo lomigo Pedilo idei madi niwatece
NaGani wetiGa ane iwaGadi eniteloco iGonagi
nigidiwa okokodi ligetedi midi niwigo libinienaGa
niGijo nelokodi Maria idei midi akiidi
niGida niwenigi daGaxa me dakake loojedi
Ijo nigaanigawaanigi idei madi lomiigo niwatece
nGijo lodajo ajo lodowa aGica digoida liGeladi
ani wetiGa me iwaGadi eniteloco iGonagi
ani wetiGa ane iwaGadi eniteloco iGonagi
